AnnouncementProtocol.description:
A protocol is a defined and standardized procedure followed
to collect, prepare, or analyze biological samples.

name.description: Name or title of the protocol.
name.title: Name

protocol_type.description: Type of protocol specified as a Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term.
protocol_type.title: Protocol Type

description.description: Detailed description of the experimental protocol.
description.title: Description

protocol_parameters.description: List of protocol parameters specified as key-value CV pairs.
protocol_parameters.title: Protocol Parameters

relates_assay_names.title: Relates Assay Names

MsAnnouncementContact.description:
A contact person associated with the mass spectrometry dataset.
This can be a submitter or a principal investigator.

full_name.title: Full Name

email_list.description: List of validated email addresses for the contact.
email_list.title: Email List

anyOf.description: ORCID digital identifier string matching the format 0000-0000-0000-000X.

orcid.description: ORCID digital identifier of the contact person.
orcid.title: ORCID

affiliation_list.description: List of institutional affiliations for the contact.
affiliation_list.title: Affiliation List

description:
Mass spectrometry profile for dataset announcements.

Main differences from Base Profile:
- Mass Spectrometry Specialization: Restricts technology_type, measurement_type, omics_type,
  and assay_type to controlled mass spectrometry terms (defaults technology_type to OBI:0000470).
- Required Fields: Enforces strict non-null values for mhd_identifier, submitters, principal_investigators,
  measurement_type, omics_type, assay_type, publications (or missing publication reason),
  study_factors, characteristic_values, and raw_data_file_list.
- Enhanced Validation: Uses specialized MS models for contacts (requiring email and affiliation),
  publications (formatted DOI and PubMed IDs), metabolites, and protocols.

mhd_identifier.description: Unique MetabolomicsHub Data (MHD) identifier for the dataset.
mhd_identifier.title: MHD Identifier

repository_identifier.description: Original dataset accession number or identifier in the source repository.
repository_identifier.title: Repository Identifier

mhd_metadata_file_url.description: URL to the primary MHD metadata file for this dataset.
mhd_metadata_file_url.title: Mhd Metadata File Url

dataset_url_list.description: List of web page or repository URLs for accessing the dataset.
dataset_url_list.title: Dataset Url List

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) assigned to the dataset.
doi.title: Doi

license.description: Data usage license or URL defining licensing terms for the dataset.
license.title: License

title.description: Title describing the mass spectrometry study or dataset.
title.title: Title

description.description: Comprehensive description or summary abstract of the mass spectrometry study.
description.title: Description

submission_date.description: Date and time when the dataset was initially submitted to the repository.
submission_date.title: Submission Date

public_release_date.description: Date and time when the dataset was made publicly accessible.
public_release_date.title: Public Release Date

submitters.description: List of submitters who registered or submitted the dataset.
submitters.title: Submitters

principal_investigators.description: List of principal investigators leading the research study.
principal_investigators.title: Principal Investigators

omics_type.description: Omics domains involved in the mass spectrometry study.

items.description: Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term for omics domain (e.g., Metabolomics, Lipidomics).

omics_type.title: Omics Type

technology_type.description: Analytical technology platform (defaults to mass spectrometry assay OBI:0000470).

items.description: Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term for mass spectrometry technology type.

technology_type.title: Technology Type

measurement_type.description: Types of MS measurements performed (e.g., Targeted or Untargeted metabolite profiling).

items.description: Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term for measurement type (e.g., Targeted or Untargeted metabolite profiling).

measurement_type.title: Measurement Type

assay_type.description: Mass spectrometry assay techniques employed (e.g., LC-MS, GC-MS).

items.description: Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term for mass spectrometry assay type (e.g., LC-MS, GC-MS).

assay_type.title: Assay Type

items.description: Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term or plain text string keyword.

submitter_keywords.description: Keywords provided by the dataset submitter as CV terms or strings.
submitter_keywords.title: Submitter Keywords

descriptors.description: Subject descriptors or tags characterizing the dataset as CV terms.
descriptors.title: Descriptors

anyOf.description: Controlled Vocabulary (CV) term specifying reason why publication details are missing.

cvTerms.name: Dataset with no associated published manuscript

publications.description: Publications or specified reason for missing publication in the dataset.
publications.title: Publications

study_factors.description: Experimental study factors varied across mass spectrometry samples.
study_factors.title: Study Factors

characteristic_values.description: Sample characteristics and metadata attributes for mass spectrometry samples.
characteristic_values.title: Characteristic Values

anyOf.description: List of experimental protocols used in sample collection, preparation, or analysis.

protocols.description: List of experimental protocols used in sample preparation and analysis.
protocols.title: Protocols

reported_metabolites.description: List of metabolites reported as identified or quantified in the dataset.
reported_metabolites.title: Reported Metabolites

repository_metadata_file_list.description: List of repository metadata files included in the dataset announcement.
repository_metadata_file_list.title: Repository Metadata File List

raw_data_file_list.description: List of mass spectrometry raw data files included in the dataset announcement.
raw_data_file_list.title: Raw Data File List

derived_data_file_list.description: List of derived data files included in the dataset announcement.
derived_data_file_list.title: Derived Data File List

supplementary_file_list.description: List of supplementary files included in the dataset announcement.
supplementary_file_list.title: Supplementary File List

result_file_list.description: List of result data files included in the dataset announcement.
result_file_list.title: Result File List

title: AnnouncementMsProfile
